stem: A political polling study surveys 50 registered voters and observes 23 positive outcomes out of 50 (46.0%). Estimate the true voter support for a policy and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.46. Wilson 95% CI: [0.3297, 0.596]. Point estimate: 0.4629.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
